---
title: "Tobacco Use Project"
---

## Introduction

This project analyzes tobacco use trends using NHIS data. Provide background on your dataset and research question. P

## Methods

Briefly discuss how the data was acquired and cleaned, and the tools you used for data exploration (further details should be provided on another page of your website).

## Results

Provide final, publication-ready tables and figures from your analysis, including at least one interactive graphic. Make separate subsections as needed.

### Interactive Dashboard

<div style="width: 90vw; position: relative; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);">
  <iframe 
    src="https://oliveroberts.shinyapps.io/biostat620-final-project/"
    style="width: 100%; height: 90vh; border: none;">
  </iframe>
</div>

Note: If a plot is not loading for a certain selection criteria, try deleting the Nicotine/Product use criteria and adding it again. This dashboard can also be found separately on [this website](https://oliveroberts.shinyapps.io/biostat620-final-project/).

## Conclusion and Summary

A brief recap where you describe your findings.
